name: Bot Info
description: Shows bot details including avatar, banner, command count, ping, owner, uptime, servers, and users.
author: Akashsuu

defaults.descriptionTemplate:
**Identity**
Bot: `{bot_name}`
Bot ID: `{bot_id}`
Owner: {owner}
Created: `{created_at}`

**Stats**
Commands: `{command_count}`
Ping: `{ping}`
Uptime: `{uptime}`
Servers: `{server_count}`
Users: `{user_count}`
Channels: `{channel_count}`

**System**
Discord.js: `{discordjs_version}`
Node.js: `{node_version}`
Memory: `{memory}`
Prefix: `{prefix}`

**Links**
Invite: {invite_link}
Support: {support_link}
defaults.notBotMessage: Bot information is unavailable right now.
